license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ba3bigin
title: Preparation of Frozen Bacteria Stock
author: Kenneth Schackart

steps_raw.instruction: Add 150 µL sterile DMSO to sterile cryotube.
Add 850 µL overnight culture to cryotube containing.
Vortex or invert repeatedly to mix.
Store cryotube in deep freezer ( -40 °C to -80 °C )
Go to the frozen storage inventory and add at a minimum the following information: Storage location Your name Date Organism identification
